summary: The diff shows modifications to Portfolio.tsx implementing error handling and image path references, but only includes 3 images per category instead of the required 20. The implementation is incomplete relative to the BuildRequest requirements.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the Portfolio component image paths to correctly reference all 60 gallery images (residential-1.png through residential-20.png, commercial-1.png through commercial-20.png, and before-after-1.png through before-after-20.png)
missing_requirements.reason: Portfolio.tsx only includes 3 images per category (9 total) instead of 20 images per category (60 total). The projects array shows only residential-1, residential-2, residential-3, commercial-1, commercial-2, commercial-3, before-after-1, before-after-2, and before-after-3.

missing_requirements.requirement: Verify and ensure all 60 gallery images are properly rendered as static assets in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence in the diff of creating, verifying, or ensuring the existence of 60 image files. The diff shows no file additions to the assets directory, and only code changes to Portfolio.tsx.

hallucinated_features.description: Image path naming convention uses '.dim_1200x800.png' suffix instead of plain '.png' as specified in requirements
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest specifies filenames like 'residential-1.png' but implementation uses 'residential-1.dim_1200x800.png'. This is a deviation from the exact naming convention requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Development-mode image validation with async validateImages function
hallucinated_features.reason: While error handling was requested (REQ-31), the diff shows a development-mode validation feature that validates image existence asynchronously, which goes beyond the specified error handling requirements of logging and fallback UI.
